# UC-15.5.8 · PoE Switch Port Power Draw Monitoring for CCTV Cameras

## Description

IR-cut heaters and long cable runs spike PoE; tracking watts prevents budget overruns and shutdowns.

## Value

Validates switch upgrades before adding 4K heads.

## Implementation

(1) SNMP or VMS-supplied PoE telemetry. (2) Compare to class budget.

## SPL

```spl
index=physical sourcetype="nvr:diagnostic" earliest=-24h
| eval poe_w=tonumber(coalesce(poe_power_w, port_power_draw_w, ""))
| eval port=coalesce(switch_port, ifDescr, "")
| where poe_w>25
| timechart span=1h max(poe_w) by port switch_name
```

## Visualization

Stacked area power; threshold line.

## References

- [ONVIF specifications](https://www.onvif.org/)
- [Hikvision OpenAPI / ISAPI](https://www.hikvision.com/en/support/download/sdk/)
